What We Offer

Rental Services

Everything you need delivered, set up, and broken down — so you focus on the moment.

SVC // 01
⛺
Tent Structures

Frame and pole tents in multiple sizes, ideal for backyard receptions, festivals, and corporate events outdoors.

  • 20×20 to 40×80 frame tents
  • Clear-span structures
  • Cathedral window sidewalls
  • Flooring & lighting add-ons
SVC // 02
🪑
Chairs & Tables

White resin folding chairs, farmhouse tables, round banquet tables — all cleaned and delivered event-ready.

  • White resin folding chairs
  • Chiavari chairs (gold/silver)
  • 60" & 72" round tables
  • 6ft & 8ft banquet tables
SVC // 03
🍽️
Linens & Décor

Crisp white and colored linens in multiple sizes, skirting, and overlays to complete your tablespace.

  • Round & rectangular tablecloths
  • Chair covers & sashes
  • Table skirting
  • Napkins & overlays
SVC // 04
💡
Lighting & Ambiance

String lights, chandeliers, and uplighting packages that transform any space after dark.

  • Edison string lighting
  • Pendant chandeliers
  • Perimeter uplighting
  • Market lights
SVC // 05
🎪
Full Event Packages

Bundled tent + table + chair + linen packages priced for value — ideal for larger celebrations.

  • 50-guest starter pack
  • 100-guest standard pack
  • 200+ custom events
  • Corporate & nonprofit pricing
SVC // 06
🚚
Delivery & Setup

We handle logistics — delivery, professional setup, and full tear-down. Serving Houston, Katy, Sugar Land, Pearland & The Woodlands.

  • Same-day setup available
  • 50-mile service radius
  • Weekend & holiday coverage
  • Post-event tear-down

Why Orbit

The Orbit Difference

Local, reliable, and genuinely invested in making your event perfect from first call to final tear-down.

01
Local & Responsive

Based in Houston — we know the venues, the neighborhoods, and the community. Fast responses, no middlemen.

02
Immaculate Equipment

Every chair, table, and linen is cleaned and inspected before delivery. Your event deserves nothing less.

03
Full-Service Logistics

We coordinate delivery windows, set everything up on time, and return for tear-down — zero stress for you.

04
Flexible & Affordable

Transparent pricing, à la carte or bundled packages, and the flexibility to scale to any guest count.

How It Works

Simple. Seamless.

Four steps from inquiry to flawless event day.

1
Request a Quote

Fill out our quick form or call us. Tell us your event date, guest count, and vision.

2
Confirm & Reserve

We send a custom quote within 24 hours. Confirm with a deposit to lock in your date.

3
We Set Up

Our crew arrives ahead of time, sets up everything to spec, and verifies every detail.

4
Enjoy & We Clean Up

Focus on celebrating. After your event, we return for full tear-down and pickup.
